channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Team USA captures record-breaking 11th gold medal at Winter Games  CBS News
  2. Winter Olympics 2026 Day 15 recap: U.S. takes gold in mixed aerials; Norway's Johannes Høsflot Klæbo caps historic run  Yahoo Sports
  3. U.S. could make Olympic medals history on final day of Milan-Cortina Games  Los Angeles Times
  4. U.S. breaks record for its most gold medals won at a Winter Olympics  NBC News
  5. Best of Team USA from Day 15 of the Milan Cortina Olympics  NBC Olympics

item.title: Bill Mazeroski, 89, Whose 9th-Inning Blast Made Pirates Champs, Is Dead - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Bill Mazeroski, 89, Whose 9th-Inning Blast Made Pirates Champs, Is Dead  The New York Times
  2. Mazeroski, known for 1960 World Series walk-off homer, dies at 89  ESPN
  3. Bill Mazeroski, Pirates great whose homer won the World Series, dies at 89  The Washington Post
  4. Remembering Maz: Pirates legend, Pittsburgh hero — a photo gallery  TribLIVE.com
  5. 'What an icon': Pirates mourn the loss of the legendary Mazeroski  MLB.com
